tasks.subject: Task 1: BackendPool ABC close() + SequentialPool no-op + parity tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend the `BackendPool` ABC with `close()` + context-manager protocol; give `SequentialPool` a no-op `close()` and a `max_in_flight` kwarg on `add()`; verify with parity tests that today's `SequentialPool` is unchanged in behaviour.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py` (BackendPool ABC, around line 354)
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/pool.py` (SequentialPool)
- Modify: `tests/core/test_pool.py` (add parity tests; update `_ListPool` fixture)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- BackendPool declares close() abstractmethod + concrete __enter__/__exit__
- SequentialPool.close() no-op, idempotent
- SequentialPool.add accepts max_in_flight kwarg (ignored)
- _ListPool test fixture gains no-op close
- with SequentialPool(backend) as pool works (calls close on exit)
- All pre-existing test_pool tests pass unmodified

**Verify:** `pixi run test -k test_pool -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py", "src/kinoforge/core/pool.py", "tests/core/test_pool.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -k test_pool -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["BackendPool declares close() abstractmethod", "BackendPool provides __enter__/__exit__", "SequentialPool.close() no-op, idempotent", "SequentialPool.add accepts max_in_flight kwarg (ignored)", "_ListPool fixture gains no-op close", "with SequentialPool(backend) as pool works", "all pre-existing test_pool tests still pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: BlockingFakeBackend helper + ConcurrentPool core (no map)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a deterministic Event-gated test backend, then build `ConcurrentPool` with init/add/_pick/_release/_run_one/submit/close. Defer `map` to Task 3. Cover ACs 1–10 and 16–20 from the spec (15 tests).

**Files:**
- Create: `tests/core/conftest.py`
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/pool.py` (add `_Slot` + `ConcurrentPool`)
- Create: `tests/core/test_concurrent_pool.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- BlockingFakeBackend with submit/result/release/fail_for
- ConcurrentPool empty/closed pool RuntimeError messages
- cap=1 serialises, cap=4 parallel
- two backends caps [1,1] one-each (registration order), [1,4] weighted (4/1 split)
- pre-occupied skipped for lower-utilization
- least-loaded re-picked after release
- close() blocks until in-flight done; idempotent; context-manager
- stress invariant: in_flight in [0, cap], observed concurrency ≥ 2 at peak
- backend exception releases slot via finally (next submit succeeds)

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/core/test_concurrent_pool.py -v && pixi run test -k test_pool -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/core/conftest.py", "src/kinoforge/core/pool.py", "tests/core/test_concurrent_pool.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/core/test_concurrent_pool.py -v && pixi run test -k test_pool -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["BlockingFakeBackend with submit/result/release/fail_for", "ConcurrentPool empty/closed pool RuntimeError messages", "cap=1 serialises, cap=4 parallel", "two backends caps [1,1] one-each, [1,4] weighted", "pre-occupied skipped for lower-utilization", "least-loaded re-picked after release", "close() blocks until in-flight done; idempotent; context-manager", "stress invariant in_flight in [0, cap]", "backend exception releases slot via finally"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: ConcurrentPool.map with fail-fast cancellation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement `map(jobs) -> list[Artifact]` that dispatches all jobs eagerly, returns results in input order, and on first exception cancels queued futures, drains in-flight ones, and re-raises the captured exception. 5 ACs (11–15).

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/pool.py` (replace the `NotImplementedError` stub with the real `map`)
- Modify: `tests/core/test_concurrent_pool.py` (append 5 tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- map([]) returns [] with zero backend calls
- map preserves input order despite reverse release
- map raises first exception on middle-job failure
- map fail-fast bounds backend.submit count (queued not started)
- map fail-fast drains in-flight on other backend (release reachable)

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/core/test_concurrent_pool.py -v` → 20 tests

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/pool.py", "tests/core/test_concurrent_pool.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/core/test_concurrent_pool.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["map([]) returns [] with zero backend calls", "map preserves input order despite reverse release", "map raises first exception on middle-job failure", "map fail-fast bounds backend.submit count (queued not started)", "map fail-fast drains in-flight on other backend (release reachable)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: GenerateClipStage branch for non-chained pool.map
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add one branch to `GenerateClipStage.run`: when `not should_chain and len(jobs) > 1`, use `pool.map(jobs)`. Chained continuity and 1-job native paths preserved verbatim.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/pipeline/generate_clip.py` (around the existing for-loop, ~line 102)
- Modify: `tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py` (3 new tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- t2v N=3 with ConcurrentPool(cap=3) dispatches in parallel (all reach backend.submit before any release)
- i2v N=3 with ConcurrentPool(cap=3) stays serial (submit-release lockstep)
- 1-job native skips map (submit_log == 1)
- all existing test_generate_clip tests pass unmodified

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/pipeline/generate_clip.py", "tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["t2v N=3 with ConcurrentPool(cap=3) dispatches in parallel", "i2v N=3 with ConcurrentPool(cap=3) stays serial", "1-job native skips map (submit_log == 1)", "all existing test_generate_clip tests pass unmodified"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: orchestrator.generate() swap SequentialPool → ConcurrentPool
tasks.description:
**Goal:** In `core/orchestrator.py:476`, replace `pool = SequentialPool(backend)` and the stage construction + run + return that follow it with a `with ConcurrentPool() as pool: pool.add(backend, max_in_flight=cfg.lifecycle.max_in_flight); ...`. Add one test that observes shutdown via spy.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py` (lines ~474–489, import on line 37, docstring around line 291)
- Modify: `tests/core/test_orchestrator.py` (1 new test)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- orchestrator.generate constructs ConcurrentPool with max_in_flight from cfg.lifecycle
- stage runs inside with-block; artifact returned from inside
- ConcurrentPool.close called exactly once on return (spy via monkey-patch)
- SequentialPool import removed from orchestrator.py
- all existing test_orchestrator tests pass unmodified
- docstring updated to reference ConcurrentPool

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/core/test_orchestrator.py -v && pixi run lint`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py", "tests/core/test_orchestrator.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/core/test_orchestrator.py -v && pixi run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["orchestrator.generate constructs ConcurrentPool with max_in_flight from cfg", "stage runs inside with-block; artifact returned from inside", "ConcurrentPool.close called exactly once on return (spy)", "SequentialPool import removed from orchestrator.py", "all existing test_orchestrator tests pass unmodified", "docstring updated to reference ConcurrentPool"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Docs (README + PROGRESS) + final gate + merge
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document the new `max_in_flight` configuration in `README.md`; record Phase 17 (Layer G) progress in `PROGRESS.md`; run the full quality gate; merge via `--no-ff` following the established layer-merge pattern.

**Files:**
- Modify: `README.md` (new "Concurrency" subsection)
- Modify: `PROGRESS.md` (Phase 17 entry mirroring Phase 14/15/16; Single next action; GitHub issues table row #3; test count refresh)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- README Concurrency subsection with yaml example + 3 behaviour bullets
- PROGRESS Phase 17 block with real SHAs for all 6 tasks
- PROGRESS Single next action updated
- PROGRESS issue #3 row marked CLOSED (Layer G)
- PROGRESS test count refreshed (528 → 548)
- Full quality gate clean
- Merge commit on main with all task SHAs + Closes #3

**Verify:** `pixi run test && pixi run typecheck && pixi run lint && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md", "PROGRESS.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test && pixi run typecheck && pixi run lint && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files", "acceptanceCriteria": ["README Concurrency subsection with yaml example", "PROGRESS Phase 17 block with real SHAs for all 6 tasks", "PROGRESS Single next action updated", "PROGRESS issue #3 row marked CLOSED", "PROGRESS test count refreshed to 548", "full quality gate clean", "merge commit lands on main with all task SHAs + Closes #3"]}
```
